title: Cuneiform Tablet #0363: Early Dynastic Literary
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a literary document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a literary document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Early Dynastic period. Literary document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records literary matters typical of Early Dynastic period administrative or literary practice.
